questionHtml:
What could account for this distribution of height in a population?

[Source: Graph adapted from Six Minutes http://sixminutes.dlugan.com/good-public-speaker-average/]

A. Gene linkage

B. Dominant alleles

C. Independent assortment

D. Multiple genes

meta.title: What could account for this distribution of height in a population? [Source: Graph adapted from Six Minutes http://sixminutes.dlugan.com/good-public-speaker-average/] A. Gene linka
